API Documentation

This documentation provides an overview of all API endpoints, models, and fields. All requests require JWT authentication in the header as Authorization: Bearer <access-token>.

Brand Model

Fields:

  • id (integer): Primary key of the brand.
  • name (string): Name of the brand (max length 100).

Endpoints:

List All Brands

GET /api/brands/

Create a Brand

POST /api/brands/

Body:

{ "name": "Brand Name" }

Retrieve a Brand

GET /api/brands/{id}/

Update a Brand

PUT /api/brands/{id}/

Body:

{ "name": "Updated Brand Name" }

Delete a Brand

DELETE /api/brands/{id}/

Product Model

Fields:

  • id (integer): Primary key of the product.
  • name (string): Name of the product (max length 100).
  • category_id (integer): Foreign key referencing Category.
  • brand_id (integer): Foreign key referencing Brand.
  • sku (string): Unique SKU identifier for the product.

Endpoints:

List All Products

GET /api/products/

Create a Product

POST /api/products/

Body:

{ "name": "Product Name", "category_id": 1, "brand_id": 1, "sku": "SKU-1001" }

Retrieve a Product

GET /api/products/{id}/

Update a Product

PUT /api/products/{id}/

Body:

{ "name": "Updated Product Name", "category_id": 1, "brand_id": 2, "sku": "SKU-1002" }

Delete a Product

DELETE /api/products/{id}/

Category Model

Fields:

  • id (integer): Primary key of the category.
  • name (string): Name of the category (max length 100).

Endpoints:

List All Categories

GET /api/categories/

Create a Category

POST /api/categories/

Body:

{ "name": "Category Name" }

Retrieve a Category

GET /api/categories/{id}/

Update a Category

PUT /api/categories/{id}/

Body:

{ "name": "Updated Category Name" }

Delete a Category

DELETE /api/categories/{id}/

Size Model

Fields:

  • id (integer): Primary key of the size.
  • name (string): Name of the size (max length 100).

Endpoints:

List All Sizes

GET /api/sizes/

Create a Size

POST /api/sizes/

Body:

{ "name": "Size Name" }

Retrieve a Size

GET /api/sizes/{id}/

Update a Size

PUT /api/sizes/{id}/

Body:

{ "name": "Updated Size Name" }

Delete a Size

DELETE /api/sizes/{id}/

Supplier Model

Fields:

  • id (integer): Primary key of the supplier.
  • name (string): Name of the supplier (max length 100).
  • address (string): Address of the supplier (max length 100).

Endpoints:

List All Suppliers

GET /api/suppliers/

Create a Supplier

POST /api/suppliers/

Body:

{ "name": "Supplier Name", "address": "Supplier Address" }

Retrieve a Supplier

GET /api/suppliers/{id}/

Update a Supplier

PUT /api/suppliers/{id}/

Body:

{ "name": "Updated Supplier Name", "address": "Updated Address" }

Delete a Supplier

DELETE /api/suppliers/{id}/

Client Model

Fields:

  • id (integer): Primary key of the client.
  • name (string): Name of the client (max length 100).
  • address (string): Address of the client (max length 100).
  • phone_number (string): Phone number of the client (max length 15).
  • company_name (string): Company name associated with the client (max length 100).

Endpoints:

List All Clients

GET /api/clients/

Create a Client

POST /api/clients/

Body:

{ "name": "Client Name", "address": "Client Address", "phone_number": "1234567890", "company_name": "Company ABC" }

Retrieve a Client

GET /api/clients/{id}/

Update a Client

PUT /api/clients/{id}/

Body:

{ "name": "Updated Client Name", "address": "Updated Address", "phone_number": "0987654321", "company_name": "Updated Company" }

Delete a Client

DELETE /api/clients/{id}/

ProductVariant Model

Fields:

  • id (integer): Primary key of the product variant.
  • product_id (integer): Foreign key referencing Product.
  • price (decimal): Price of the variant.
  • size_id (integer): Foreign key referencing Size.
  • sell_price (decimal): Selling price of the variant.

Endpoints:

List All Product Variants

GET /api/product-variants/

Create a Product Variant

POST /api/product-variants/

Body:

{ "product_id": 1, "price": 20.99, "size_id": 1, "sell_price": 25.99 }

Retrieve a Product Variant

GET /api/product-variants/{id}/

Update a Product Variant

PUT /api/product-variants/{id}/

Body:

{ "product_id": 1, "price": 21.99, "size_id": 2, "sell_price": 26.99 }

Delete a Product Variant

DELETE /api/product-variants/{id}/

Branch Model

Fields:

  • id (integer): Primary key of the branch.
  • name (string): Name of the branch (max length 100).

Endpoints:

List All Branches

GET /api/branches/

Create a Branch

POST /api/branches/

Body:

{ "name": "Branch Name" }

Retrieve a Branch

GET /api/branches/{id}/

Update a Branch

PUT /api/branches/{id}/

Body:

{ "name": "Updated Branch Name" }

Delete a Branch

DELETE /api/branches/{id}/
